name: Arched 28"x70" Wood Framed Leaner Mirror Brass - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Transform your room with the elegance and functionality of this Arched Wood-Framed Leaner Mirror from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The full-length mirror is designed to lean against a wall and is enclosed in a stylish brass-finish wooden frame with an arched top and two turned legs. It creates a striking focal point in your entryway, sunroom or dining room while making your space feel larger, bringing in light and providing a head-to-toe view.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
